title: BoxProfile
description: BoxProfile: Rectangular hollow profile with constant thickness and optional corner radii.

Height.description: Full depth between the extreme fibres of the flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Width.description: Full width between the extreme fibres of the webs. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Thickness.description: Thickness of both webs and flanges. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

OuterRadius.description: Corner radius for all four corners of the outer bounding rectangle. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

InnerRadius.description: Corner radius for all four corners of the inner void rectangle. Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

Edges.description: Edge curves that matches the dimensions in the global XY-plane.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
